overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy night exploration through a suburban residential area with palm trees, neon lights, and wet streets. The player walks along sidewalks and streets, briefly enters a courtyard with vibrant pink neon signage, and passes by NPCs near vending machines.

events.description: moves from sidewalk onto the wet asphalt street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a wooden fence, then stepping onto the empty street

entered.detail: tall wooden barrier with blue and white graffiti tags running along the sidewalk
tall palm tree trunk visible on the right side of the path
overhead electrical wires crisscrossing between utility poles
tall lamp posts casting yellow-white light through the fog
low-rise houses with lit windows visible behind the fence

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered wooden fence in a foggy residential area. The camera moves forward and transitions onto a wet asphalt street lined with palm trees and overhead power lines, with streetlights cutting through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy suburban street with palm tree median

events.description: begins turning left toward a building entrance with pink lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the deserted wet street, surrounded by fog and palm trees

entered.detail: rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the streetlights with yellow double lines

segments.scene_description: Walking down the middle of a fog-shrouded suburban street lined with palm trees on both sides. The wet asphalt reflects the streetlights, and residential buildings with glowing windows line the road. The atmosphere is heavy with fog, reducing visibility to the distant horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with vibrant pink neon signage

events.description: enters a courtyard area with prominent magenta neon lighting and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: turning left into a courtyard area to explore the neon-lit space with outdoor furniture

entered.detail: bright magenta neon light tube mounted on a pole illuminating the area with pink light
large outdoor umbrella glowing red from the neon light above it
raised wooden platform with tables and chairs under the umbrella
residential building exterior with windows and a green door

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a semi-enclosed courtyard dominated by a vibrant pink neon sign that casts a magenta glow over the area. An outdoor seating area with a red umbrella and wooden deck sits to the right, while the building facade looms on the left. The space feels sheltered from the foggy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with vending machines and utility structures

events.description: exits the neon courtyard back into the alleyway with vending machines
encounters two NPCs standing near the vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines and observing NPCs in the alleyway

notable_agents.action: two characters standing near vending machines, one appears to be wearing a hat

entered.detail: row of brightly lit automated vending machines with colorful advertisements
chain-link and corrugated metal barriers separating properties

segments.scene_description: Exiting the courtyard, the scene shifts to a narrow alley lined with brightly lit vending machines on the left and metal fencing on the right. Two NPCs stand near the machines, and the area is dimly lit with a mix of neon glow and ambient street lighting.

events.description: vehicle with headlights passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward an intersection, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking in the opposite direction through the fog

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising sign visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to the open residential street, walking toward a foggy intersection. A vehicle passes by with bright headlights, and silhouetted pedestrians walk through the mist. A distant billboard glows through the fog, while palm trees continue to line both sides of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy suburban neighborhood that shifts from muted residential streets into vibrant neon-lit pockets before returning to the misty open road. It begins on a narrow sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered wooden fence, moving forward onto a wet asphalt street where palm trees and overhead power lines are shrouded in heavy fog. As the camera advances down the center of the road, the scene turns into a semi-enclosed courtyard dominated by a vibrant pink neon sign that casts a magenta glow over a wooden deck and red umbrella. The movement then shifts into a narrow alley lined with glowing vending machines and waiting NPCs before finally emerging back onto the open street. The shot concludes as the camera heads toward a foggy intersection, passing a vehicle with bright headlights and silhouetted pedestrians under the distant glow of a billboard.
